name: mainline-golden-path-smoke
title: Mainline Golden Path Smoke
description: Add the smallest real verification for the core loop: create tavern with coordinate + NPC + rules/LLM config, enter as visitor, chat, persist history/state/memory/state-card candidates, and verify revisit/owner-visible feedback.
creator: lijin
notes: Added backend v1 golden-path smoke test covering create→configure NPC/LLM rules→enter→chat→memory/state-card writeback→revisit owner feedback. No production code change was needed; focused pytest, compileall, and task validate passed.
